name: omx
description: oh-my-experiments marketplace — the experiment-analysis & design harness (analyze runs, diagnose regressions, design the next experiment, run a semi-autonomous analyze-design-eval loop).

plugins.name: oh-my-experiments
plugins.description: Experiment-analysis & design harness for RL/ML research. Self-contained omx CLI over .omx/ JSON state, zero runtime dependency on other harnesses.
